--- empty_bounded_quantifier.sql
(a)-[e]->{,}(b)

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphPattern{
  Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
    &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
      Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
        Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Rparen:  2,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 1,
                  NameEnd: 2,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
              StartPos:  3,
              EndPos:    9,
              Direction: "RIGHT",
              Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 5,
                  NameEnd: 6,
                  Name:    "e",
                },
              },
            },
            Quantifier: &ast.GQLBoundedQuantifier{
              Lbrace: 9,
              Rbrace: 11,
              Comma:  10,
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLPathTerm{
            Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
              Lparen:  12,
              Rparen:  14,
              Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                EmptyPos: -1,
                Variable: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 13,
                  NameEnd: 14,
                  Name:    "b",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
(a)-[e]->{,}(b)
